discovery.text: Toronto Star: Best Date Night Restaurants (Feb 2026)

narrative.summary: Cozy French wine bar that Toronto's top chefs choose for their own date nights — featured in Toronto Star's 'Best Date Night Restaurants' (Feb 2026). Intimate room, natural wines, seasonal French plates. 4.5★ (581 reviews). The kind of place where the meal becomes a conversation. Worth a deliberate stop for John’s design/architecture/art/food radar.
